words.meaning_en: A flat paper container used to send letters
words.example_sentence: He put the letter inside the envelope.

words.meaning_en: An electronic device used for processing information
words.example_sentence: She learned typing on the computer.

words.meaning_en: A device used for speaking to people in other places
words.example_sentence: He called his mother on the telephone.

words.meaning_en: An instrument used for writing with ink
words.example_sentence: She wrote her name with a blue pen.

words.meaning_en: A small piece of paper stuck on a letter to pay for posting
words.example_sentence: He put a stamp on the envelope.

words.meaning_en: The details of where a person lives or a place is located
words.example_sentence: Write your address on the top of the letter.

words.meaning_en: A machine connected to a computer that prints on paper
words.example_sentence: She sent the document to the printer.

words.meaning_en: A device used to join papers together with metal pins
words.example_sentence: He used the stapler to bind the sheets.

words.meaning_en: A chart showing the days, weeks, and months of a year
words.example_sentence: She marked the exam date on the calendar.

words.meaning_en: A cardboard cover used to keep papers together
words.example_sentence: He kept all his documents in a folder.

words.meaning_en: A gathering of people to discuss something
words.example_sentence: Dad was in a meeting at the office.

words.meaning_en: A written account giving information about something
words.example_sentence: She wrote a report about her science project.

words.meaning_en: The latest time by which something must be completed
words.example_sentence: She finished her homework before the deadline.
His colleague helped him finish the project.
